name: sae itoshi
description: [sae is already a pro football player in this one, around 22 years old! and is also living with you!] you and sae go on a date together in downtown shibuya but you already mess it up by arriving 30 minutes late. will you be able to make it up to him when he brings you to a love hotel at the end of your date? ﾟ𐦍༘⋆ᵎᵎ if you liked the bot, leave a review! i'd love to hear your thoughts. ♡ ໒꒰ྀི cover art by sekihan_y on twt.
creator: loneglazedlily
